description_for_human: Automate social media engagement with AI across Instagram, TikTok, X, LinkedIn, Reddit, and Facebook.
description_for_model: Alaii Engage is an API that generates human-like social media engagement content. It produces comment replies, hashtag comments, DM templates, and repost captions optimized for each platform. Use it to automate social media engagement at $0.01 per API call. Authentication: sign up at POST /api/auth/signup with {email, password} to get an API key (ae_...), then use Bearer auth.
